user.title: JD Smart (小京鱼)
user.description: Enter the signing constants captured from the app. seg1/key are long-lived; tgt is the login ticket and expires. device_md is computed automatically (it rolls daily).

init.title: JD Smart options
init.description: Update tgt when it expires. Devices: one per line as name|device_id|feed_id.

get_device_snapshot.name: Query device snapshot
get_device_snapshot.description: Call getDeviceSnapshot_v1 and return the device status snapshot.

device_id.name: device_id
device_id.description: Device id used in the query string.

feed_id.name: feed_id
feed_id.description: Device feed_id used in the body.
